race.comment: TAGA SMILE (3) progressed nicely last start to finish a close third over a similar trip at Beaudesert after missing the placings at the previous appearance. Gets a key booking in Heywood from a cosy draw. Ready to win now. DURNESS (5) showed little early speed then came with a strong run to finish second last time here. Peaking now and will be tough to hold out again. HABIB ALBI (1) never looked likely here last time when always well back but his form prior stacks up. Backs up quickly and is worth another chance. FINDING ELLE (7) improved last start but found a couple better over 1720m at this track, beaten 2 lengths. Has peaks that measure up and is worth keeping in mind. COOK MY GOOSE (2) has mixed her form since resuming but backs up quickly and could fill a minor spot.
